item.title: [AP-SOUTHEAST-SYD2][Public Cloud] - Planned decommission of the region
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 15, 06:00 - 16:00 UTC

May 28, 09:48 UTC
Scheduled - Start time : 15/08/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 15/08/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : Public Cloud instances hosted in the AP-SOUTHEAST-SYD-2 region
Service improvement : As part of the continuous evolution of our Public Cloud offering, OVHcloud will progressively phase out the AP-SOUTHEAST-SYD-2 region in Sydney and focus future developments on the SYD1 region.
Services hosted in AP-SOUTHEAST-SYD-2 will enter maintenance mode before a definitive shutdown in the coming months.
Affected customers must manually migrate their workloads and data to the SYD1 region to avoid service disruption.

Required customer actions
Customers are required to:
- Create new instances in the SYD1 region
- Manually migrate applications, services, and data
- Validate workloads on the new infrastructure
- Stop and delete old instances once migration is completed

We strongly recommend performing backups before starting the migration process.
Migration documentation:
https://help.ovhcloud.com/csm/en-ie-public-cloud-compute-migration-between-az?id=kb_article_view&sysparm_article=KB0073126

To compensate for the inconvenience, OVHcloud will automatically apply a credit corresponding to one month of the affected services usage.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Storage] - Object Storage S3 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 15, 07:00 UTC  -  Jul 22, 16:00 UTC

Jun 22, 12:19 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Data Platform offer.

Start time : 15/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : S3-compatible Object Storage endpoints will now support IPv6 in dual-stack mode (IPv4 and IPv6), while maintaining unchanged IPv4 connectivity. However, customers with misconfigured IPv6 networking may experience connectivity issues when accessing S3-compatible Object Storage.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Object Storage S3 infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Object storage] - Infrastructure maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 15, 06:00 - 08:00 UTC

Jun 16, 20:30 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Object storage infrastructure.

Start time : 15/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 15/07/2026 08:00 UTC
Service impact : Some instances located in GRA region will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our infrastructure in the specified region.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Containers & Orchestration] - End of Life of Load Balancer for Managed Kubernetes Service notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 9, 08:00 - 16:00 UTC

Jun 4, 16:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of the end-of-life of our Containers & Orchestration - Load Balancer (IOLB) offer, a maintenance is scheduled in BHS5 / DE1 / GRA5 / GRA7 / GRA9 / GRA11 / SBG5 / SGP1 / SYD1 / WAW1 / UK1 / US-EAST-VA / US-WEST-OR regions.

Start time : 09/07/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 09/07/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : We're retiring the historical Load Balancer for Managed Kubernetes, now replaced by the Public Cloud Loadbalancer. As part of this change, resources will be deleted and no longer billed.
Note: the migration to Public Cloud Loadbalancer is not automatic and must be performed on your side. (https://docs.ovhcloud.com/en/guides/public-cloud/containers-orchestration/managed-kubernetes/migrate-iolb-to-public-cloud-loadbalancer)
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Containers & Orchestration - Load Balancer in the specified regions.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Data & Analytics] - Data Platform Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 6, 12:00 - 15:00 UTC

Jun 23, 17:24 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Data Platform offer.

Start time : 06/07/2026 12:00 UTC
End time : 06/07/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Data Platform infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX/SBG][Containers & Orchestration] - Managed Rancher Service maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 1, 07:30 - 16:00 UTC

Apr 22, 17:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Containers & Orchestration offer.

Start time : 01/07/2026 07:30 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we need to upgrade Ranchers in version 2.11 to version 2.12. You can already manage the upgrade by yourself through OVHcloud Control panel or API.
The Rancher compatibility matrix with downstream clusters will change, indeed K8S version 1.30 will no longer be officially supported.
For more information regarding Managed Rancher Service supported versions and lifecycle policy, you can visit this page: KB0064608

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA9][File storage] - File storage incident notification
item.description:
Jun 26, 19:05 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our File storage offering has been resolved.

Start time : 26/06/2026 09:07 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 19:00 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 10:21 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our File storage offer on the specific GRA9 region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 26/06/2026 09:07 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some File storage are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact :Some customers are temporarily unable to access their File storage.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [UK1][Containers & Orchestration] - Managed Kubernetes Service Incident Notification

End time : 26/06/2026 06:40 UTC

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 25, 19:25 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Containers & Orchestration offer on the specific UK1 regions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 18:49 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some instances in the UK1 region are unreachable.
Customers Impact : Management and creation of new Managed Kubernetes Service clusters is temporarily unavailable.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Customers Impact : For these regions, you might have issues to create, start, or manage your instances and create or attach new volumes.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Start time : 23/06/2026 10:00 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 13:35 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying software malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 14:18 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our AI & Machine Learning offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/06/2026 10:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Qwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct model is currently unavailable on AI Endpoints.
Customers Impact : Customers calling the Qwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct model endpoint are experiencing HTTP 503 errors.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Storage] - Block storage maintenance notification

Jun 22, 06:00 UTC

DE1
EU-WEST-PAR-A
GRA11
GRA3
GRA5
GRA7
GRA9
RBX-A
SBG5
SYD1
US-WEST-OR

Start time : 22/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, customers may experience a temporary performance degradation.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy and to improve service quality, we will be doing a software upgrade on our Block Storage servers.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Data & Analytics] - Data Platform maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 22, 15:46 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our Data Platform is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Jun 22, 12:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 12, 09:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Data Platform offer.

Here are the details of the maintenance:
Start time : 22/06/2026 12:00 UTC
End time : 22/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Data Platform infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Compute - Instance] - Instances Operating System Maintenance Notification
item.description:
Jun 22, 15:39 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our Compute - Instance is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Jun 22, 14:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 11, 17:47 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Compute - Instance offer for the EU and CA regions.

Start time : 22/06/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 22/06/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : The operating systems Ubuntu 25.04 and Fedora 42 are end-of-life.
Customers who have already installed one of these operating systems may continue to use it, but will no longer be able to reinstall it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, starting from June 1st, customers will no longer be able to install end-of-life operating systems.
We encourage customers using these operating systems to migrate to supported versions such as Ubuntu 26.04 or Fedora 44, or a later version.

You can find the information at the following links:
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1144
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1158

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][AI & Machine Learning] - AI Endpoint incident notification

Customers Impact : Customers may have error 500 message on AI Endpoints.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA5/7/9/11][Compute - Instance] - Some Instances Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 21, 09:08 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Compute - Instance offer in the GRA5/7/9/11 regions which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 08:38 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 08:47 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some instances in the GRA5/7/9/11 regions were temporarily unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access and use their instances in the GRA5/7/9/11 regions.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

Start time : 15/06/2026 23:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Nodes located in EU-WEST-PAR region may experience packets drop while communicating with their controlplanes and the Internet.
Customers Impact : Customer are temporarily facing connectivity issues with their nodes located in the specified region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA7][Containers & Orchestration] - Managed Kubernetes Service incident notification
item.description:
Jun 17, 08:21 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 17/06/2026 07:40 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 08:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Managed Kubernetes Service's API was temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to perform create/update/delete calls in their kubernetes API server in GRA7.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA/RBX/DE][Storage and Backups] - Object Storage Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 15, 13:48 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Storage and Backups offering has been resolved.

Start time : 13/05/2026 00:00 UTC
End time : 15/06/2026 12:00 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 11, 10:05 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Storage and Backups offering in GRA/RBX/DE regions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/05/2026 00:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Delay in lifecycle rules execution for regions GRA, RBX and DE.
Customers Impact : Some customers might face delay in lifecycle rules execution in specified regions.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : Processing has been improved and most of the backlog has been cleared. Some workloads with a very high number of pending events may still experience delays while we continue optimizing processing.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 25, 08:58 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The incident is still under investigation by our technical teams, who are working to determine its cause and implement a fix.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 22, 15:04 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Storage and Backups offering, which is causing temporary functionality issue in GRA/RBX/DE regions

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/05/2026 00:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Delay in lifecycle rules execution for regions GRA, RBX and DE
Customers Impact : Some customers might face delay in lifecycle rules execution in specified regions.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
